zh.lifeSummary: 當Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON於1319年出生在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Guy I de Blois-Châtillon22歲，母親Marguerite de Valois24歲。他於1337年6月4日與Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1364年9月29日在法國布列塔尼莫比韓奧雷享年45歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼吉加普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON于1319年出生在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Guy I de Blois-Châtillon22岁，母亲Marguerite de Valois24岁。他于1337年6月4日与Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1364年9月29日在法国布列塔尼莫比韓奧雷享年45岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼吉加普。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: When Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON was born in 1319, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, his father, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, was 22 and his mother, Marguerite de Valois, was 24. He married Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE on 4 June 1337, in Paris, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 September 1364, in Auray, Morbihan, Brittany, France, at the age of 45, and was buried in Guingamp, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON est né en 1319, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Valois, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE le 4 juin 1337, à Paris, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1364, à Auray, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Guingamp, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON 1319 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy I de Blois-Châtillon 22 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Valois 24. Er hat am 4. Juni 1337 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1364 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Auray, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Guingamp, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON è nato il nel 1319 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, il suo padre, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Valois, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE il 4 giugno 1337, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1364, nel Auray, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLONが1319年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Guy I de Blois-Châtillonは22歳，母Marguerite de Valoisは24歳であった。1337年6月4日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでJeanne de PENTHIÈVREと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1364年9月29日にフランスブレタグンモービハンアウレイで45歳で死去し，フランスブレタグングインガンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON(이)가 1319년 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy I de Blois-Châtillon(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Valois(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1337년 6월 4일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 9월 29일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 오라이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 길그가프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON nasceu em 1319, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Valois, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE em 4 de junho de 1337, em Paris, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1364, em Auray, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Guingamp, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON родился в 1319 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy I de Blois-Châtillon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Valois, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE 4 июня 1337 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1364 г. в местности ауреи, морбихань, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности гуингамп, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON nació en 1319, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, su papá, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Valois, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE el 4 de junio de 1337, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1364, en Auray, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia.
